message:
Adapt tenzir-test invocations to use environment variables (#5682)

## Summary

Switches all tenzir-test invocations from CLI arguments to environment
variables for specifying binary paths. This adapts the codebase to the
recent removal of CLI argument support in tenzir-test, which now uses
environment variables exclusively:

- `TENZIR_BINARY` (environment variable) replaces `--tenzir-binary` (CLI
argument)
- `TENZIR_NODE_BINARY` (environment variable) replaces
`--tenzir-node-binary` (CLI argument)

## Files Updated

- **Dockerfile**: Updated the integration test stage to pass binary
paths via environment variables
- **nix/tenzir/check.nix**: Updated Nix build configuration to use
environment variables
- **tenzir/CMakeLists.txt**: Updated CMake build system test command
generation to use environment variables

## Test Plan

- Build Tenzir using the updated CMakeLists.txt configuration
- Run integration tests in Docker to verify the environment variables
are properly passed
- Verify Nix builds complete successfully with the updated check.nix
- Confirm tenzir-test correctly receives binary paths via environment
variables

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

files.patch:
@@ -409,11 +409,12 @@ USER tenzir:tenzir
 FROM tenzir-ce-untested AS tenzir-ce-integration
 
 COPY test/ ./test
-RUN XDG_CACHE_HOME=/tmp XDG_DATA_HOME=/tmp "${PREFIX}/libexec/uv" tool run \
+RUN XDG_CACHE_HOME=/tmp XDG_DATA_HOME=/tmp \
+    TENZIR_BINARY="$PREFIX/bin/tenzir" \
+    TENZIR_NODE_BINARY="$PREFIX/bin/tenzir-node" \
+    "${PREFIX}/libexec/uv" tool run \
     --python ">=3.12" \
     tenzir-test \
-    --tenzir-binary "$PREFIX/bin/tenzir" \
-    --tenzir-node-binary "$PREFIX/bin/tenzir-node" \
     --root test \
     -j $(nproc) && \
     echo "success" > /tmp/tenzir-integration-result

@@ -30,8 +30,6 @@ stdenvNoCC.mkDerivation {
         if [ -d "${path}/test/tests" ]; then
           echo "running ${path} integration tests"
           tenzir-test \
-            --tenzir-binary ${lib.getBin unchecked}/bin/tenzir \
-            --tenzir-node-binary ${lib.getBin unchecked}/bin/tenzir-node \
             --root "${src}/test" \
             -j $NIX_BUILD_CORES \
             ${path}/test
@@ -43,6 +41,8 @@ stdenvNoCC.mkDerivation {
       export UV_NO_INDEX=1
       export UV_OFFLINE=1
       export UV_PYTHON=${lib.getExe py3}
+      export TENZIR_BINARY=${lib.getBin unchecked}/bin/tenzir
+      export TENZIR_NODE_BINARY=${lib.getBin unchecked}/bin/tenzir-node
       export TENZIR_ALLOC_STATS=1
       ${lib.optionalString (stdenvNoCC.buildPlatform.isx86_64) "export TENZIR_ALLOC_ACTOR_STATS=1"}
       mkdir -p cache data state tmp

@@ -213,17 +213,15 @@ function (tenzir_build_test_command out_var)
   list(
     APPEND
     cmd
+    "TENZIR_BINARY=$<TARGET_FILE:tenzir::tenzir>"
+    "TENZIR_NODE_BINARY=$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:tenzir::tenzir>/tenzir-node"
     "--"
     "${TENZIR_UV_PATH}"
     "tool"
     "run"
     "--python"
     ">=3.12"
-    "tenzir-test"
-    "--tenzir-binary"
-    "$<TARGET_FILE:tenzir::tenzir>"
-    "--tenzir-node-binary"
-    "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:tenzir::tenzir>/tenzir-node")
+    "tenzir-test")
 
   # Add extra arguments if provided
   if (ARG_EXTRA_ARGS)
